title: Annoying happy ghast
description: Very loud noises for happy ghast
body:
Isn't this flying trash annoying enough for you?

Do you want something more to make you throw your computer and mental health out the window?

This resource pack is for you!

It replaces all Happy Ghast sounds from an annoying voice to an even more annoying one

Why only Happy Ghast and not Ghastling?

Ghastling is too cute to change... and it doesn't fly around like an idiot with your mobs tied to it!
